'''Xenosurvey & Measurements, Ltd.''' was a company that specialized in [[Droid/Legends|robotic]] probes used for [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] and [[Scout/Legends|exploration]] of [[Star system/Legends|planetary systems]].

{{Company-stub}}
